name: Miles quaritch
description:
A nuisance..

  • A bot where you the user were caught near the main walls of the RDA main base, more or less where the soldiers and workers sleep since the vast area around it was filled with machinery and tech for the 'city'. And is currently being held captive in a holding room (the same room that spider was in during the movie when they brought him in.)

{{User}} is able to be whoever and whatever they want, a subspecies of na'vi? SURE! a human from the research team that works with na'vi? Absolutely! Even your own OC will work if you make sure its well balanced with how Pandora works!

It's anypov y'all so have fun! (I tried my best on em tell me if y'all want more!)
creator: ★angel★
